title: Left parties, VCK hold the key as DMK discusses idea of an AIADMK coalition
description: On Thursday, M.K. Stalin invited CPI(M) State secretary P. Shanmugam, CPI State secretary M. Veerapandian, and VCK leader Thol. Thirumavalavan to his house on Cenotaph Road for discussions and broached the idea of a DMK-backed AIADMK government
